Swap Crypto Instantly with Changelly

Fast, secure, and easy crypto-to-crypto or fiat-to-crypto exchanges. No sign-up required.

Start Exchanging

Why Use Changelly?

Changelly offers seamless cryptocurrency swaps with over 500 assets supported. Whether you're converting Bitcoin to Ethereum or buying crypto with a card, the process is quick and user-friendly.

Enjoy competitive rates, simple UI, and the peace of mind that comes with using a trusted platform that's been operating since 2015.

Earn Crypto with Our Referral Program

Invite your friends and followers to use Changelly via your unique referral link. You earn a percentage of every exchange they make – passive income made easy.

There's no cap on earnings, and you’ll get detailed analytics on your referrals.

How It Works

1. Click the “Start Exchanging” button above.

2. Choose the crypto you want to send and receive.

3. Enter the recipient address and confirm the transaction.

4. That’s it – fast and private exchange, done in minutes.
